name: Simulacrum

components.materialDescription: powdered ruby worth 1,500+ GP, which the spell consumes

formOptions: Simulacrum of one Beast or Humanoid

effects.description: Creates a Construct simulacrum using the original creature statistics, with half Hit Point maximum, command obedience, turn sharing, and rest/level restrictions.
Damaged simulacrum Hit Points can be restored only by repair during the caster Long Rest, expending components worth 100 GP per Hit Point restored while the simulacrum stays within 5 feet.

You create a simulacrum of one Beast or Humanoid that is within 10 feet of you for the entire casting of the spell. You finish the casting by touching both the creature and a pile of ice or snow that is the same size as that creature, and the pile turns into the simulacrum, which is a creature. It uses the game statistics of the original creature at the time of casting, except it is a Construct, its Hit Point maximum is half as much, and it can't cast this spell. The simulacrum is Friendly to you and creatures you designate. It obeys your commands and acts on your turn in combat. The simulacrum can't gain levels, and it can't take Short or Long Rests. If the simulacrum takes damage, the only way to restore its Hit Points is to repair it as you take a Long Rest, during which you expend components worth 100 GP per Hit Point restored. The simulacrum must stay within 5 feet of you for the repair. The simulacrum lasts until it drops to 0 Hit Points, at which point it reverts to snow and melts away. If you cast this spell again, any simulacrum you created with this spell is instantly destroyed.

controlOptions.name: Beast Or Humanoid Target
controlOptions.effect: The copied creature must be one Beast or Humanoid.

controlOptions.name: Ten Foot Casting Presence
controlOptions.effect: The copied creature must be within 10 feet of you for the entire casting.

controlOptions.name: Ice Or Snow Body
controlOptions.effect: You finish by touching the creature and a same-size pile of ice or snow, which turns into the simulacrum.

controlOptions.name: Construct Copy
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum uses the original creature's statistics except it is a Construct.

controlOptions.name: Half Hit Point Maximum
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum's Hit Point maximum is half the original creature's.

controlOptions.name: Cannot Cast Simulacrum
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum cannot cast this spell.

controlOptions.name: Friendly To Designated Creatures
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum is Friendly to you and creatures you designate.

controlOptions.name: Acts On Your Turn
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum acts on your turn in combat.

controlOptions.name: Cannot Rest
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum cannot take Short or Long Rests.

controlOptions.name: Repair During Long Rest
controlOptions.effect: If damaged, the simulacrum can restore Hit Points only by repair as you take a Long Rest.

controlOptions.name: Repair Cost Per HP
controlOptions.effect: Repair requires components worth 100 GP per Hit Point restored.

controlOptions.name: Repair Proximity
controlOptions.effect: The simulacrum must stay within 5 feet of you for repair.

controlOptions.name: Drops To Zero Reverts To Snow
controlOptions.effect: When it drops to 0 Hit Points, it reverts to snow and melts away.

controlOptions.name: Recast Destroys Existing Simulacrum
controlOptions.effect: If you cast this spell again, any simulacrum you created with this spell is instantly destroyed.
